moves.name: Serpent's Tongue Flicker
moves.description: Velvet Whisper drops into a low sideways stance, then explodes into a rapid three-hit combination: a sharp elbow jab to the midsection, a precise open-palm strike to the chin, and a spinning back-knuckle to the temple, all delivered in under a second using minimal body movement to maximize speed and conserve energy.
moves.image_snapshot: Low side stance with knees bent, weight on the left leg, right arm fully extended at chin height with fingers rigid in an open-palm strike, left elbow pulled back tight to the ribs, torso rotated 60 degrees left, raven hair swept forward over the right shoulder, gold serpent arm cuffs visible on both forearms. Motion blur on the right hand and forearm.

moves.name: Crimson Heel Decree
moves.description: Velvet Whisper plants her left foot, raises her right knee to chest height, then drives a precise downward axe kick with the heel in a vertical arc, targeting the collarbone with the full calculated force of her hip rotation and body drop behind it.
moves.image_snapshot: Standing on the left leg with knee slightly bent, right leg raised vertically with the heel at its apex directly above the head, toes pointed upward, torso upright and square-facing, both arms extended outward at shoulder height for balance, lace garter visible on the raised right thigh, raven hair hanging straight down from the inverted momentum. Speed lines along the full length of the raised right leg.

moves.name: Hazel-Green Hex
moves.description: Velvet Whisper locks her mismatched gaze forward, tilts her head back slightly, then snaps it forward as both eyes emit a split-second dual-colored flash — one emerald, one hazel — that radiates outward in a narrow cone, delivering a disorienting supernatural concussive pulse that staggers opponents without physical contact.
moves.image_snapshot: Upright standing position, head tilted slightly forward with chin angled down, both eyes wide open and emitting two distinct beams of light — left eye radiating emerald green, right eye radiating deep amber — torso square to the viewer, both arms held slightly away from the body with fingers spread, gold filigree choker and ruby pendant illuminated by the upward eye-light, raven hair pushed back from the face by the forward energy release. Radial speed lines emanating outward from both eyes.
